p.strong: Critical Rule: Buffer NOT safe until notification CQE

g.text: Out-of-Order Scenario: Notification May Arrive After Subsequent Ops

div.p:
The notification CQE for SEND_ZC(op_A) may arrive AFTER the completion CQE for SEND(op_B). Wrong: c // After SEND_ZC(op_A) completion CQE free(buf_A); // BUG: Notif not yet arrived! // After SEND(op_B) completion CQE
process(op_B); // buf_A memory corrupted!

text.tspan: // COMPLETION: Send was queued, buffer STILL in use

g.text: printf("ZC send queued (%d bytes), awaiting notif\n",

text.tspan: // COMPLETION: Send was queued, buffer STILL in use
ZC send queued (%d bytes), awaiting notif

div.p: Submit SEND_ZC c io_uring_prep_send_zc(sqe, fd, buf, 4096, 0, 0);
Completion CQE c cqe->res = 4096 // bytes queued cqe->flags = 0 // NO NOTIF flag
⚠️ DANGER ZONE ⚠️ c // BUG: Buffer still in use! free(buf); // DATA CORRUPTION
Notification CQE c cqe->flags = IORING_CQE_F_NOTIF // Transmission complete
Buffer Safe c // NOW safe to free/reuse free(buf); // ✓ OK
